Row5 pattern: X X X X □: columns1-4 X. So column4 has X in rows 1,3,4,5; empty row2. Good.

Distractor1 has X in col5 row4 and row2 empty. Distinct.

We can phrase: "The grid has an X in every cell of the first four columns of rows 1,3, and 5; additionally, there is an X in the first column of row 2 and an X in the fourth column of row 4." That distinguishes.
